attributes.action: upgrade talybont park as its dangerous
attributes.additional_details: All the equipment is rusty and outdated as its been there for 20+ years a baby swing is missing moss everywhere which is slippery and is a health and safety hazard,, there is pot holes glass all the equipment is unsafe there is no safety flooring under the equipment the child can get hurt,, its a big risk and we have asked many times to update it no answer so im doing this its down right disgusting!
attributes.background: upgrade talybont park as its a health and safety risk for the children they cant run around like kids they have to hold parents hands to go on the equipment and there is moss everywhere and glass its unsafe

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

You could also raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
